name: Dr Linnit Pessoa
title: Associate Lecturer in Economics
biography: Her research interests focus on structuralist macroeconomics, the international political economy of the just transition, green extractivism, financialisation, and sustainable development in peripheral economies. She was part of the Executive Secretariat of the G20 Climate Task Force during Brazil’s presidency, contributing research on transition finance and green industrial policy. Linnit was a Visiting Researcher at King’s College London and at Université Paris Cité (Sorbonne). She has published articles in peer-reviewed journals and book chapters. At SOAS, she teaches Macroeconomic Analysis I, Macroeconomic Analysis II, Elementary Statistics, and Economic Principles (Macro).
research_interests: Just transition; Sustainable development; Peripheral economies; Structural change; Green extractivism; Financialisation; Economic planning
